description: Phase 42: Integration & Polish - Production Ready. Create packages/integration/ with cross-app deep linking, global notification center, settings sync, performance optimization utilities, accessibility helpers, and cross-app integration test infrastructure.
steps: Create packages/integration/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/realtime, @quant/notifications, @quant/sync-engine, zod. Create packages/integration/tsconfig.json extending root.
Create packages/integration/src/types.ts - Type definitions for DeepLink, UnifiedNotification, SettingsProfile, PerformanceMetric, AccessibilityConfig, IntegrationTest, BundleAnalysis
Create packages/integration/src/core/deep-linking.ts - DeepLinkRouter class: registerRoute, resolveLink, generateLink, handleUniversalLink, appToAppCommunication, getRegisteredSchemes, validateLink

Create packages/integration/src/core/notification-center.ts - GlobalNotificationCenter class: pushToUnifiedInbox, getUnifiedInbox, markRead, dismissAll, getByApp, setPreferences, getUnreadCount, groupByApp, filterByPriority

Create packages/integration/src/core/settings-sync.ts - SettingsSyncService class: getProfile, updatePreference, syncAcrossDevices, getAccessibilitySettings, setLanguage, setTheme, exportSettings, importSettings, resolveConflict

Create packages/integration/src/core/performance.ts - PerformanceOptimizer class: analyzeBundles, suggestCodeSplitting, measureLoadTime, getLazyLoadConfig, getCacheStrategy, getResourceHints, getWebVitals, optimizeImages

Create packages/integration/src/core/accessibility.ts - AccessibilityEngine class: checkWCAGCompliance, getARIAAttributes, optimizeForScreenReader, getColorContrast, getKeyboardNavigation, getFocusManagement, getAnnouncements
Create packages/integration/src/core/cross-app-tests.ts - CrossAppTestRunner class: runIntegrationSuite, testDeepLinks, testNotificationFlow, testSettingsSync, testDataConsistency, generateReport
Create packages/integration/src/__tests__/deep-linking.test.ts - Tests for route registration, link resolution, app-to-app communication
Create packages/integration/src/__tests__/notification-center.test.ts - Tests for unified inbox, grouping, filtering, preferences
Create packages/integration/src/__tests__/settings-sync.test.ts - Tests for preference sync, conflict resolution, device coordination
acceptance_criteria: packages/integration/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
DeepLinkRouter provides universal linking across all apps
GlobalNotificationCenter unifies notifications from all apps
PerformanceOptimizer provides bundle analysis and optimization guidance
All classes have comprehensive TypeScript types
Unit tests pass for deep linking, notifications, and settings sync
pnpm typecheck passes for the package
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run packages/integration/src/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
